Insights Engine

Why It Worked

Pattern analysis across your top-performing content this period.

HOOKOpening Pattern
1

Contrarian opens outperform positive framing by 2.4×

2

Questions with implicit financial fear drive watch time

3

Specific numbers (e.g. "$847") increase trust signals

VISUALVisual Strategy
1

Text overlays with 3+ lines correlate with higher saves

2

Clean white or blurred backgrounds remove distraction

3

Face-to-camera adds 38% more comment engagement

TRENDTrend Surfing
1

Generational comparison formats are high-share this quarter

2

Myth-busting finance content indexed +62% in April

3

"No math" framing reduces drop-off in first 3 seconds

AUDIOAudio & Pacing
1

Trending audio adds ~18% distribution boost on TikTok

2

Posts under 28s outperform longer formats by 31%

3

Voiceover with captions increases watch completion
